name: What if I make changes and still don’t show up in ChatGPT?
description: Keep changes controlled, then retest the same prompts after time for indexing and discovery.

mainEntity.name: What if I make changes and still don’t show up in ChatGPT?

acceptedAnswer.text: If results are delayed, do not keep changing everything at once, because that makes it harder to know what helped. Make one set of changes, test again after indexing has time to update, and compare the prompts you care about before and after.
acceptedAnswer.description: Keep changes controlled, then retest the same prompts after time for indexing and discovery.
